MimesisPlayerEnhancement._description: Global mod options, including verbose debug logging.

EnableDebugLogging.title: Enable Debug Logging
EnableDebugLogging.description: Write extra diagnostic messages to the MelonLoader console. Useful for troubleshooting.

LastSeenModVersion.title: Last Seen Mod Version
LastSeenModVersion.description: Last mod version whose changelog you acknowledged in the web dashboard.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_Ui._description: Extended save picker, scalable spectator list, and local HUD tweaks. Applies to your client only.

ModToastDurationSeconds.title: Message Duration (seconds)
ModToastDurationSeconds.description: How long mod messages stay visible before fading. Vanilla join/leave messages are unchanged (~2 seconds). Client-only.

EnableExtendedSaveSlots.title: Enable Extended Save Slots
EnableExtendedSaveSlots.description: Replace separate New/Load Tram menus with one save picker (up to 99 manual slots). Client-only.

EnableExtendedSpectatorPlayerList.title: Enable Extended Spectator List
EnableExtendedSpectatorPlayerList.description: Show a two-column spectator list that scales to screen height. Living players first, then dead. Client-only.

EnableLoadingWaitPlayerList.title: Loading Wait Player List
EnableLoadingWaitPlayerList.description: Show a player roster on the loading screen while waiting for others. Client-only.

EnableExtendedInGameMenuPlayerList.title: Enable Extended Menu List
EnableExtendedInGameMenuPlayerList.description: Pin the join-code button at the top and stretch the ESC menu player list with a scrollbar when needed. Client-only.

EnableDamageHealthGlow.title: Enable Damage Health Outline
EnableDamageHealthGlow.description: Briefly outline other players, mimics, and monsters in a health-colored glow when they take damage — green when healthy, red when low, blood-red on a kill. Never on your own character. Client-only.

EnableFloatingDamageNumbers.title: Enable Floating Damage Numbers
EnableFloatingDamageNumbers.description: Show red floating damage numbers when others take damage. Never on your own character. Client-only.

FloatingDamageDurationSeconds.title: Damage Number Duration (seconds)
FloatingDamageDurationSeconds.description: How long floating damage numbers stay visible.

EnableFpsUi.title: Enable FPS UI
EnableFpsUi.description: Replace the top-left health bar with numeric health and toxicity readouts beside the hotbar. Client-only.

EnableFpsUiInventoryNetWorth.title: Enable Inventory Net Worth
EnableFpsUiInventoryNetWorth.description: Show total sell value of your inventory above the hotbar. Works with or without FPS UI. Client-only.

RoundStartSoundMode.title: Dungeon Landing Sound
RoundStartSoundMode.description: Replace the melody that plays right after the tram stops. Departure and end-of-run horns stay vanilla. Client-only.

RoundStartSoundVariant.title: Landing Sound
RoundStartSoundVariant.description: Sound to play when mode is Specific Sound.

RoundStartSoundRandomPool.title: Landing Sound Pool
RoundStartSoundRandomPool.description: Random Sound mode only — which sounds can be picked. Leave empty for all sounds. Client-only.

RoundStartSoundVolume.title: Landing Sound Volume
RoundStartSoundVolume.description: Playback volume for custom dungeon landing sounds (Random or Specific mode). Does not affect the tram-stop sting or vanilla mode. Client-only.

CustomLoadingScreenMode.title: Loading Screen Mode
CustomLoadingScreenMode.description: Replace loading screen art with custom themes. Client-only.

CustomLoadingScreenVariant.title: Loading Screen Theme
CustomLoadingScreenVariant.description: Theme to use when mode is Specific Theme.

CustomLoadingScreenRandomPool.title: Loading Screen Pool
CustomLoadingScreenRandomPool.description: Random Theme mode only — which themes can be picked. Leave empty for all themes. Client-only.

CustomLoadingScreenMotion.title: Loading Screen Motion
CustomLoadingScreenMotion.description: Slow pan/zoom on single-frame loading images. Frame sequences always animate. Client-only.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_Privacy._description: Block automatic outbound data from your game client. Each player controls these locally. Feedback reports you submit yourself are never blocked.

EnablePrivacy.title: Enable Privacy Controls
EnablePrivacy.description: When on, the options below block automatic uploads and tracking. When off, vanilla behavior is unchanged.

BlockReluTelemetry.title: Block Relu Telemetry
BlockReluTelemetry.description: Stop session and gameplay logs sent to mimesisapi.relugameservice.com.

BlockReplayUpload.title: Block Replay Upload
BlockReplayUpload.description: Prevent replay files from being uploaded to Relu storage.

BlockReplayRecording.title: Block Replay Recording
BlockReplayRecording.description: Stop creating replay files entirely, including voice and network capture.

StripCrashReportMetadata.title: Strip Crash Metadata
StripCrashReportMetadata.description: When crash reports are on, omit nickname, session ID, and dungeon seed. Hidden while crash reports are blocked.

BlockKraftonGppSdk.title: Block Krafton Creator SDK
BlockKraftonGppSdk.description: Skip Krafton creator-code login on startup.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_DungeonRandomiz._description: Randomize tram dungeon picks, map variants, and procedural map flavor. Host only.

EnableDungeonRandomizer.title: Enable Dungeon Randomizer
EnableDungeonRandomizer.description: Randomize dungeon picks, map variants, and map layout style. Host only.

RandomizeDungeonPick.title: Randomize Dungeon Pick
RandomizeDungeonPick.description: Override which dungeon is rolled on the tram. Host only.

DungeonPickPoolMode.title: Dungeon Pool Mode
DungeonPickPoolMode.description: How dungeons are chosen from the pool. See options below.

DungeonAllowlist.title: Dungeon Allowlist
DungeonAllowlist.description: Comma-separated dungeon IDs. When set, only these dungeons can be picked. Host only.

DungeonBlocklist.title: Dungeon Blocklist
DungeonBlocklist.description: Comma-separated dungeon IDs to exclude from the pool. Host only.

IgnoreDungeonExcludeList.title: Ignore Recent Dungeons
IgnoreDungeonExcludeList.description: With Widen vanilla cycle, allow recently played dungeons to appear again. Host only.

RandomizeMapVariant.title: Randomize Map Variant
RandomizeMapVariant.description: Pick map variants evenly instead of using vanilla selection. Host only.

DungeonSeedFlavor.title: Map Layout Style
DungeonSeedFlavor.description: Procedural map style. Non-vanilla picks from pre-tested seeds per dungeon. Host only.

options.ShortMainPath: Short main path — shortest start-to-goal spine
options.LongMainPath: Long main path — longest start-to-goal spine
options.Dense: Dense — rooms packed in a small area
options.Cramped: Cramped — many rooms in a tight footprint
options.Linear: Linear — long main path, few branches
options.BroadBranches: Broad branches — many shallow side wings
options.WideOpen: Wide open — connected and spread out
options.DeepMaze: Deep maze — deep branches with dead ends

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_DungeonTime._description: Extend shift deadlines when more players are in the session. Host only.

EnableDungeonTime.title: Enable Dungeon Time
EnableDungeonTime.description: Add extra shift time when more players are in the session. Host only.

DungeonTimeBaselinePlayerCount.title: Baseline Player Count
DungeonTimeBaselinePlayerCount.description: No extra shift time at or below this count (vanilla is 4). Minimum is 1.

ExtraShiftSecondsPerPlayerAboveBaseline.title: Extra Shift Time (seconds)
ExtraShiftSecondsPerPlayerAboveBaseline.description: Real seconds added per player above the baseline. Minimum is 0.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_Weather._description: Fixed, cycling, or vanilla weather plus synced start time for lighting. Host only.

EnableWeather.title: Enable Weather
EnableWeather.description: Control dungeon weather, cycling presets, and start time. Host only.

WeatherMode.title: Weather Mode
WeatherMode.description: How weather changes during a run. Host only.

FixedWeatherPreset.title: Fixed Weather
FixedWeatherPreset.description: Weather preset when mode is Fixed.

DisableRandomWeather.title: Disable Random Weather
DisableRandomWeather.description: Vanilla mode only — keep scheduled changes but remove random weather. Host only.

WeatherCyclePresets.title: Cycle Presets
WeatherCyclePresets.description: Cycle mode only — comma-separated preset names in order (Sunny, Rain, HeavyRain, Squall). Host only.

WeatherCycleMinDelaySeconds.title: Cycle Min Delay (seconds)
WeatherCycleMinDelaySeconds.description: Shortest wait before the next weather change. Host only.

WeatherCycleMaxDelaySeconds.title: Cycle Max Delay (seconds)
WeatherCycleMaxDelaySeconds.description: Longest wait before the next weather change. Host only.

StartTimePreset.title: Start Time
StartTimePreset.description: In-game clock at dungeon start (lighting only; shift deadline unchanged). Host only.

EnableRealtimeTramClock.title: Realtime Tram Clock
EnableRealtimeTramClock.description: Update the tram console clock every in-game minute during a run. Requires Enable Weather. Host only.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_JoinAnytime._description: Let friends join after a session has already started. Host only.

EnableJoinAnytime.title: Enable Join Anytime
EnableJoinAnytime.description: Let players join after a session has already started. Host only.

JoinConnectionGraceSeconds.title: Join Grace Period (seconds)
JoinConnectionGraceSeconds.description: Block tram departure while a connecting player loads. Players who aren't ready in time are kicked (host is never kicked). Host only.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_LootMultiplicat._description: Adjust map loot and enemy drops; scale with player count or filter item types. Host only.

EnableLootMultiplicator.title: Enable Loot Multiplier
EnableLootMultiplicator.description: Scale map loot and enemy drops, and optionally turn mimic fake drops into real loot. Host only.

LootMultiplicatorPlayerCountScaleRate.title: Loot Scale Rate
LootMultiplicatorPlayerCountScaleRate.description: Extra bonus per player above 4, used by the Auto Scale toggles below (0.10 = +10% per extra player). Minimum is 0.

AutoScaleMapLootByPlayerCount.title: Scale Map Loot by Players
AutoScaleMapLootByPlayerCount.description: Increase map loot for each player above 4. Stacks with Map Loot Multiplier.

MapLootMultiplier.title: Map Loot Multiplier
MapLootMultiplier.description: How much loot appears on the dungeon map — more fixed items and more random spawns (1 = vanilla, 2 = double). Not for triggered-event loot. With a filter active, Map Loot Filter Scaling keeps this about spawn count.

AutoScaleDropLootByPlayerCount.title: Scale Drop Loot by Players
AutoScaleDropLootByPlayerCount.description: Increase enemy death drops for each player above 4. Stacks with Drop Loot Multiplier.

DropLootMultiplier.title: Drop Loot Multiplier
DropLootMultiplier.description: How much loot enemies drop when killed (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

LootItemFilterMode.title: Item Filter Mode
LootItemFilterMode.description: Which items can spawn from random loot pools. See options below.

LootAllowlist.title: Loot Allowlist
LootAllowlist.description: Comma-separated item IDs (e.g. 12345,67890). Only these items spawn when filter mode is Allowlist only. See docs/LOOT_ITEM_IDS.md for the full list.

LootBlocklist.title: Loot Blocklist
LootBlocklist.description: Comma-separated item IDs to never spawn. Used when filter mode is Blocklist only. See docs/LOOT_ITEM_IDS.md for the full list.

AutoScaleMapLootBudgetForFilter.title: Map Loot Filter Scaling
AutoScaleMapLootBudgetForFilter.description: Keeps Map Loot Multiplier about spawn count when a filter only allows expensive or cheap items. Only applies when a filter is active.

ConvertFakeActorDyingDropChancePercent.title: Fake Drop Chance (percent)
ConvertFakeActorDyingDropChancePercent.description: Chance (0–100) that a mimic's fake inventory items become real loot when it dies. 0 = vanilla, 100 = always real.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_MimicTuning._description: Tune mimic voice frequency, inventory-copy rules, and possession timing. Host only.

EnableMimicTuning.title: Enable Mimic Tuning
EnableMimicTuning.description: Tune mimic voice, inventory copying, and possession timing. Host only.

MimicVoiceTuningMode.title: Voice Tuning Mode
MimicVoiceTuningMode.description: Vanilla keeps game voice timing. Custom uses the settings below.

PeriodicVoiceIntervalMultiplier.title: Voice Interval Multiplier
PeriodicVoiceIntervalMultiplier.description: Custom only: how often mimics speak between lines (1 = vanilla, 0.5 = about twice as often).

PlayerVoiceResponseChancePercent.title: Voice Response Chance (%)
PlayerVoiceResponseChancePercent.description: Custom only: chance a nearby mimic repeats a player line after they speak (0–100).

PlayerVoiceResponseCooldownSeconds.title: Voice Response Cooldown (seconds)
PlayerVoiceResponseCooldownSeconds.description: Custom only: minimum seconds between mimic replies (vanilla is 3).

PlayerVoiceResponseDelayMinSeconds.title: Voice Response Delay Min (seconds)
PlayerVoiceResponseDelayMinSeconds.description: Custom only: shortest pause before a mimic replies.

PlayerVoiceResponseDelayMaxSeconds.title: Voice Response Delay Max (seconds)
PlayerVoiceResponseDelayMaxSeconds.description: Custom only: longest pause before a mimic replies. Must be ≥ min.

PlayerVoiceResponseMaxDistance.title: Voice Response Range (m)
PlayerVoiceResponseMaxDistance.description: Custom only: how far mimics can hear and react (vanilla is 20).

MimicInventoryCopyMode.title: Inventory Copy Mode
MimicInventoryCopyMode.description: Vanilla uses game rules. Custom uses the pick rule below.

MimicInventoryCopyPickRule.title: Inventory Copy Target
MimicInventoryCopyPickRule.description: Custom only: which player's inventory mimics copy.

EnableMimicPossessionTuning.title: Enable Possession Tuning
EnableMimicPossessionTuning.description: Tune how long dead-player mimic possession lasts and its cooldown. Host only.

RandomizeMimicPossessionDuration.title: Randomize Possession Duration
RandomizeMimicPossessionDuration.description: Roll a random speak duration between min and max below.

MimicPossessionMinTimeSeconds.title: Possession Min Time (seconds)
MimicPossessionMinTimeSeconds.description: Shortest speak duration when randomized (vanilla is 12).

MimicPossessionMaxTimeSeconds.title: Possession Max Time (seconds)
MimicPossessionMaxTimeSeconds.description: Longest speak duration when randomized (vanilla is 12).

MimicPossessionCooltimeMultiplier.title: Possession Cooldown Multiplier
MimicPossessionCooltimeMultiplier.description: Wait time after possession before the next E-possession (1 = vanilla).

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_Economy._description: Tune starting cash, scrap value, shop prices, and optional currency retention. Host only.

EnableEconomy.title: Enable Economy
EnableEconomy.description: Scale money, scrap value, shop prices, and reinforce costs. Optionally keep unspent cash between cycles. Host only.

EconomyPlayerCountScaleRate.title: Economy Scale Rate
EconomyPlayerCountScaleRate.description: Extra bonus per player above 4, used by the Auto Scale toggles below (0.10 = +10% per extra player). Minimum is 0.

AutoScaleStartupMoneyByPlayerCount.title: Scale Startup Money by Players
AutoScaleStartupMoneyByPlayerCount.description: Increase starting money for each player above 4. Stacks with Startup Money Multiplier.

StartupMoneyMultiplier.title: Startup Money Multiplier
StartupMoneyMultiplier.description: Starting maintenance-room cash on a new save (1 = vanilla, 2 = double). Not when loading a save.

AutoScaleScrapSellValueByPlayerCount.title: Scale Scrap Value by Players
AutoScaleScrapSellValueByPlayerCount.description: Increase scrap sell value for each player above 4. Stacks with Scrap Sell Value Multiplier.

ScrapSellValueMultiplier.title: Scrap Sell Value Multiplier
ScrapSellValueMultiplier.description: Currency from scrapping items and tram quota value (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleShopBuyPriceByPlayerCount.title: Scale Shop Prices by Players
AutoScaleShopBuyPriceByPlayerCount.description: Increase shop prices for each player above 4. Stacks with Shop Buy Price Multiplier.

ShopBuyPriceMultiplier.title: Shop Buy Price Multiplier
ShopBuyPriceMultiplier.description: Shop and vending machine prices (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

ShopDiscountMinPercent.title: Shop Discount Min (percent)
ShopDiscountMinPercent.description: Lowest discount when one is rolled (0–100). Only used when discount chance is above 0.

ShopDiscountMaxPercent.title: Shop Discount Max (percent)
ShopDiscountMaxPercent.description: Highest discount when one is rolled (0–100). Must be ≥ min.

ShopDiscountChancePercent.title: Shop Discount Chance (percent)
ShopDiscountChancePercent.description: Chance per shop item to get a discount between min and max (0 = vanilla, 100 = every item).

AutoScaleReinforcePriceByPlayerCount.title: Scale Reinforce Prices by Players
AutoScaleReinforcePriceByPlayerCount.description: Increase reinforce costs for each player above 4. Stacks with Reinforce Price Multiplier.

ReinforcePriceMultiplier.title: Reinforce Price Multiplier
ReinforcePriceMultiplier.description: Item reinforcement cost in maintenance (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

RetainUnspentCurrencyBetweenCycles.title: Keep Unspent Cash
RetainUnspentCurrencyBetweenCycles.description: Keep leftover maintenance cash when leaving for the next dungeon. Does not affect tram repair cost. Host only.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_MorePlayers._description: Raise the vanilla four-player session cap for larger groups. Host only.

EnableMorePlayers.title: Enable More Players
EnableMorePlayers.description: Raise the player cap above 4. Host only.

MaxPlayers.title: Max Players
MaxPlayers.description: Maximum players including the host (1 = solo, 2 = host + 1, etc.).

EnableScalingRoundGoals.title: Enable Scaling Round Goals
EnableScalingRoundGoals.description: Scale tram repair quota by zone instead of capping at vanilla stage 5. Requires More Players. Host only.

RoundGoalBasePerZone.title: Round Goal Base
RoundGoalBasePerZone.description: Base dollars multiplied by the zone curve (zone 1 at defaults ≈ $200).

RoundGoalMoneyMultiplier.title: Round Goal Multiplier
RoundGoalMoneyMultiplier.description: Global multiplier on the tram repair quota (1 = formula only, 2 = double).

RoundGoalRandomSpreadPercent.title: Round Goal Spread (percent)
RoundGoalRandomSpreadPercent.description: Random ±% around the computed quota when leaving maintenance.

RoundGoalCurveExponent.title: Round Goal Curve
RoundGoalCurveExponent.description: Zone growth curve: 1 = linear, below 1 = flatter late game, above 1 = steeper.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_MoreVoices._description: Store many more recorded player voice lines for mimics per run. Host only.

EnableMoreVoices.title: Enable More Voices
EnableMoreVoices.description: Store more recorded player voice lines for mimics. Host only.

UnifyIndoorOutdoorVoices.title: Unify Indoor/Outdoor Voices
UnifyIndoorOutdoorVoices.description: Share indoor and outdoor voice storage. Deathmatch stays separate.

MaxIndoorVoiceEvents.title: Max Indoor Voices
MaxIndoorVoiceEvents.description: Maximum stored voice lines per player in dungeon runs.

MaxDeathMatchVoiceEvents.title: Max Deathmatch Voices
MaxDeathMatchVoiceEvents.description: Maximum stored voice lines per player in deathmatch.

MaxOutdoorVoiceEvents.title: Max Outdoor Voices
MaxOutdoorVoiceEvents.description: Maximum stored voice lines per player outdoors.

RecordVoiceInMaintenance.title: Record in Maintenance
RecordVoiceInMaintenance.description: Record mimic voice lines in the maintenance room.

RecordVoiceInTram.title: Record in Tram
RecordVoiceInTram.description: Record mimic voice lines in the tram waiting scene.

RecordVoiceDuringMimicPossession.title: Record During Possession
RecordVoiceDuringMimicPossession.description: Keep recording while a player possesses a mimic.

EnableVoicePerformanceCache.title: Enable Performance Cache
EnableVoicePerformanceCache.description: Cache voice data to reduce lag with large voice pools. Host only.

VoiceClipCacheMaxEntries.title: Voice Cache Size
VoiceClipCacheMaxEntries.description: Maximum decoded voice clips kept in memory.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_Persistence._description: Save and restore mimic voice recordings across save/load. Host only.

EnablePersistence.title: Enable Voice Persistence
EnablePersistence.description: Save and restore mimic voice recordings across save/load. Host only.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_PlayerAnnouncem._description: On-screen tips for dungeon settings, boss spawns, and personal death stats. Host only.

ShowPlayerAnnouncements.title: Show Player Messages
ShowPlayerAnnouncements.description: Show tips for dungeon settings, boss spawns, and your stats when you die. Does not replace game messages. Host only.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_PlayerTuning._description: Adjust movement speed, stamina, and carry weight for everyone in the session. Host only.

EnablePlayerTuning.title: Enable Player Tuning
EnablePlayerTuning.description: Scale move speed, stamina, and carry weight for everyone. Clients don't need the mod. Host only.

MoveSpeedMultiplier.title: Move Speed Multiplier
MoveSpeedMultiplier.description: Walk and run speed (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

NoClipSpeedMultiplier.title: Noclip Speed Multiplier
NoClipSpeedMultiplier.description: Dashboard noclip fly speed relative to walk/run (3 = triple). Only while noclip is on.

StaminaDrainMultiplier.title: Stamina Drain Multiplier
StaminaDrainMultiplier.description: Sprint stamina cost (1 = vanilla, 0.5 = half drain).

StaminaRegenDelayMultiplier.title: Stamina Regen Delay Multiplier
StaminaRegenDelayMultiplier.description: Wait before stamina regen after sprinting (1 = vanilla, 0.5 = sooner).

MaxCarryWeightMultiplier.title: Carry Weight Multiplier
MaxCarryWeightMultiplier.description: Maximum carry weight and encumbrance threshold (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

DisablePlayerCollision.title: Disable Player Collision
DisablePlayerCollision.description: Walk through other players and mimics on your client (e.g. crowded tram). Monsters and walls stay solid. Client-only.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_SpawnScaling._description: Scale monster and trap spawn budgets by type or player count. Host only.

EnableSpawnScaling.title: Enable Spawn Scaling
EnableSpawnScaling.description: Scale monster and trap spawns by type or player count. Host only.

SpawnScalingPlayerCountScaleRate.title: Spawn Scale Rate
SpawnScalingPlayerCountScaleRate.description: Extra bonus per player above 4, used by the Auto Scale toggles below (0.10 = +10% per extra player). Minimum is 0.

AutoScaleMimicSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Scale Mimic Spawns by Players
AutoScaleMimicSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: Increase mimic spawns for each player above 4. Stacks with Mimic Spawn Multiplier.

MimicSpawnMultiplier.title: Mimic Spawn Multiplier
MimicSpawnMultiplier.description: Total mimic spawns per run, including periodic waves (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleBossSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Scale Boss Spawns by Players
AutoScaleBossSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: Increase boss spawns for each player above 4. Stacks with Boss Spawn Multiplier.

BossSpawnMultiplier.title: Boss Spawn Multiplier
BossSpawnMultiplier.description: Map-placed bosses and bonus encounters after a kill (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleJakoSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Scale Jako Spawns by Players
AutoScaleJakoSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: Increase jako spawns for each player above 4. Stacks with Jako Spawn Multiplier.

JakoSpawnMultiplier.title: Jako Spawn Multiplier
JakoSpawnMultiplier.description: Ambient dungeon monster spawns (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleSpecialSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Scale Special Spawns by Players
AutoScaleSpecialSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: Increase special spawns for each player above 4. Stacks with Special Spawn Multiplier.

SpecialSpawnMultiplier.title: Special Spawn Multiplier
SpecialSpawnMultiplier.description: Periodic and map-placed special monsters (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleTrapSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Scale Trap Spawns by Players
AutoScaleTrapSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: Increase trap spawns for each player above 4. Stacks with Trap Spawn Multiplier.

TrapSpawnMultiplier.title: Trap Spawn Multiplier
TrapSpawnMultiplier.description: Map-placed traps and bonus encounters after trigger/kill (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

PeriodicSpawnWaitMode.title: Spawn Wave Timing
PeriodicSpawnWaitMode.description: Delay before the first monster wave and time between waves. Vanilla uses dungeon data; Fixed and Random use settings below.

InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitSeconds.title: First Wave Delay (seconds)
InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitSeconds.description: Fixed mode: seconds after dungeon start before the first spawn wave.

InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitMinSeconds.title: First Wave Delay Min (seconds)
InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitMinSeconds.description: Random mode: shortest wait before the first spawn wave.

InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitMaxSeconds.title: First Wave Delay Max (seconds)
InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitMaxSeconds.description: Random mode: longest wait before the first spawn wave.

PeriodicSpawnIntervalSeconds.title: Wave Interval (seconds)
PeriodicSpawnIntervalSeconds.description: Fixed mode: seconds between spawn waves.

PeriodicSpawnIntervalMinSeconds.title: Wave Interval Min (seconds)
PeriodicSpawnIntervalMinSeconds.description: Random mode: shortest time between spawn waves.

PeriodicSpawnIntervalMaxSeconds.title: Wave Interval Max (seconds)
PeriodicSpawnIntervalMaxSeconds.description: Random mode: longest time between spawn waves.

MapPlacedEncounterDelayMinSeconds.title: Encounter Delay Min (seconds)
MapPlacedEncounterDelayMinSeconds.description: Shortest wait after clearing a map marker before a bonus spawn can appear.

MapPlacedEncounterDelayMaxSeconds.title: Encounter Delay Max (seconds)
MapPlacedEncounterDelayMaxSeconds.description: Longest wait for that bonus spawn delay.

MapPlacedEncounterMinPlayerDistanceMeter.title: Encounter Min Distance (m)
MapPlacedEncounterMinPlayerDistanceMeter.description: Hold the spawn until no players are within this radius. 0 = spawn as soon as the delay ends.

AutoScaleOtherSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Scale Other Spawns by Players
AutoScaleOtherSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: Increase other spawns for each player above 4. Stacks with Other Spawn Multiplier.

OtherSpawnMultiplier.title: Other Spawn Multiplier
OtherSpawnMultiplier.description: Spawns that aren't mimics, bosses, jakos, specials, or traps (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_Statistics._description: Track deaths, kills, play time, mimic encounters, and more per save. Host only.

EnableStatistics.title: Enable Player Statistics
EnableStatistics.description: Track deaths, kills, play time, and more per save slot. Host only.

SessionReconnectGraceMinutes.title: Reconnect Grace (minutes)
SessionReconnectGraceMinutes.description: Reuse the previous session when a player reconnects within this time.

ShowStatisticsToasts.title: Show Statistics Messages
ShowStatisticsToasts.description: Show stats messages on join/leave and session intro. Does not replace game connect messages. Host only.

MimesisPlayerEnhancement_WebDashboard._description: Browser view for players, stats, settings, and moderation while the game runs.

WebDashboardListenAddress.title: Listen Address
WebDashboardListenAddress.description: HTTP bind address. Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access.

WebDashboardListenPort.title: Listen Port
WebDashboardListenPort.description: TCP port for the web dashboard.

stats.session_started: A new stats session has been started.

announce.map_run_empty: Your run this map: no recorded activity yet.

joinanytime.blocked_dungeon: Can't depart yet — other players are still in the dungeon.
joinanytime.blocked_split: Can't depart yet — other players are still outside the tram.
joinanytime.blocked_connecting: Can't depart yet — a player is still connecting.

saveslots.funny_tram_10: Mind the gap between the saves
saveslots.funny_tram_28: Leaving the station of good ideas

api.web_dashboard_readonly: Web dashboard settings cannot be changed from the web UI. Edit the config file instead.
api.web_dashboard_no_save_override: Web dashboard settings cannot be overridden per save slot.
api.saved_save: Applied — use in-game save to persist to disk.
api.save_override_not_allowed: This setting cannot be overridden per save slot.
api.player_banned_offline: Player banned (disconnect may have failed if already offline).
api.revive_not_allowed: Revive not allowed in the current room state.
api.player_dead_use_respawn: Player is dead. Use respawn instead.
api.cannot_moderate_host: Cannot moderate the local host player.
api.host_cheats_require_alive: Host cheats require an alive host player.
api.player_cheats_require_alive: Player cheats require an alive in-game player.
api.player_cheats_require_blind_off: Turn off blind mode before enabling player cheats.
api.timed_out: Timed out waiting for the game thread.
api.item_spawned_world: Inventory full — item spawned in front of player.
api.player_delete_not_found: No stored player data found for this Steam ID.
api.player_delete_connected: Cannot delete player data while they are connected.
api.cannot_delete_host: Cannot delete the local host player.
api.quick_preset_builtin_readonly: Built-in quick presets cannot be modified.
api.quick_preset_exists: A user preset with this ID already exists.
api.quick_profile_preset_applied: Quick preset applied to this save.

loot_picnic.name: Loot Picnic
loot_picnic.description: High loot, low spawns — explore and hoard without much danger.

as_intended.name: As Intended™
as_intended.description: Vanilla gameplay with More Players and Join Anytime enabled.

full_house.name: Full House
full_house.description: Most features on with +10% scaling per player above 4.

abandon_hope.name: Abandon All Hope
abandon_hope.description: Brutal spawns, higher money targets, and heavy player-count scaling.

dashboard.changelog_lead: You updated to v{version}. Here's everything that changed in recent releases.
dashboard.changelog_pending_badge: New update — changelog not yet acknowledged
dashboard.page_desc_changelog: Recent mod changes and release notes.
dashboard.nav_lobby_disabled_hint: Join a lobby to access this page
dashboard.nav_host_only_hint: Host only — not available as a guest
dashboard.home_lead: A maintained mod for MIMESIS that consolidates community tweaks and adds original features: larger lobbies, mimic voice persistence, join-anytime, spawn/loot/economy scaling, dungeon randomization, weather control, session statistics, and this web dashboard — all configurable from one place. Only the host needs the mod installed.
dashboard.home_status_hint: Host or join a game in Mimesis first. This dashboard connects automatically once you enter a lobby.
dashboard.home_section_web_lead: In-lobby tools in your browser while the game is running.
dashboard.home_section_mod_lead: Gameplay enhancements applied by the host. Guests can join without installing the mod.
dashboard.home_web_players_desc: See who is connected, view vitals and session stats, and use host moderation tools such as kick, ban, heal, respawn, and item spawn.
dashboard.home_web_minimap_desc: Follow player positions on a live dungeon map during runs. Guests can use blind mode to hide spoilers.
dashboard.home_web_stats_desc: Browse per-save leaderboards and open detailed player statistics across sessions.
dashboard.home_web_settings_desc: Edit global defaults and per-save overrides, switch quick presets, and tune every feature without hand-editing the config file.
dashboard.home_mod_more_players_desc: Raise the vanilla four-player session cap so larger groups can play together.
dashboard.home_mod_more_voices_desc: Let mimics store many more recorded player voice lines per run.
dashboard.home_mod_persistence_desc: Keep mimic voice recordings when you save and load a game.
dashboard.home_mod_join_anytime_desc: Allow friends to join after a session has already started.
dashboard.home_mod_ui_desc: Extended save picker, scalable spectator list, and configurable mod toast duration.
dashboard.home_mod_statistics_desc: Track deaths, kills, play time, mimic encounters, and more per save game.
dashboard.home_mod_announcements_desc: On-screen tips for dungeon settings, boss spawns, and personal death stats.
dashboard.home_mod_spawn_scaling_desc: Scale monster and trap spawn budgets by type or player count.
dashboard.home_mod_loot_desc: Adjust how much loot appears on the map and drops from enemies.
dashboard.home_mod_economy_desc: Tune starting cash, quotas, scrap value, shop prices, and optional currency retention.
dashboard.home_mod_dungeon_time_desc: Extend shift deadlines when more players are in the session.
dashboard.home_mod_mimic_tuning_desc: Adjust mimic voice frequency, inventory-copy bias, and possession timing.
dashboard.home_mod_player_tuning_desc: Change movement speed, stamina, and carry weight.
dashboard.home_mod_dungeon_randomizer_desc: Randomize which dungeons appear and how they are laid out.
dashboard.home_mod_weather_desc: Fixed, cycling, or vanilla weather plus synced start time for lighting.
dashboard.blind_mode_title: Hide alive/dead status, health, toxic, and respawn actions to avoid spoilers during dungeon and deathmatch runs while you are alive. Inactive in the maintenance bay and tram scene. Temporarily disabled while you are dead so you can review others' stats.
dashboard.god_mode_title: Toggle invulnerability and freeze toxicity for this player.
dashboard.noclip_title: Toggle free movement for this player.
dashboard.donation_lead: If you enjoy Mimesis Player Enhancement, a small tip helps keep it maintained — but it's never required.
dashboard.donation_reason_time: Patches, testing, and compatibility work for every MIMESIS update take real time.
dashboard.donation_reason_ai: This project uses AI tools too — subscriptions and compute aren't free.
dashboard.donation_reason_community: Support helps keep the mod free and open source for everyone.
dashboard.donation_footnote: The mod stays free and open source either way.
dashboard.waiting_api_error: Cannot reach the dashboard API. Make sure the game is running with the mod loaded.
dashboard.waiting_connect_hint: Host or join a game in Mimesis first. This dashboard will connect automatically once you are in a game.
dashboard.dev_verify_line_punchline: git blame: confirmed — this one wrote JoinAnytime
dashboard.leaderboard_host_only: Leaderboard is only available to the host.
dashboard.leaderboard_no_data: No leaderboard data for this save slot yet.
dashboard.minimap_layout_hint: Dungeon layout is still generating or unavailable. Player markers will appear once positions are known.
dashboard.minimap_no_map_tram: Focused player is in the tram — no map available.
dashboard.minimap_no_map: No map available for this scene.
dashboard.settings_profile_intro: Pick a quick preset for this save slot, use your global defaults, or customize every value.
dashboard.settings_profile_global_desc: Follow global defaults from Global Settings with no per-save overrides.
dashboard.quick_customize_banner: Using preset: {label} — editing any value switches this save to custom settings.
dashboard.quick_preset_builtin_readonly: Built-in presets cannot be changed or deleted.
dashboard.quick_share_placeholder: Paste an MPE1:… share string here
dashboard.settings_search_by_placeholder: Search by name, key, or value…
dashboard.settings_intro_global: Edit global mod defaults. These apply everywhere unless overridden for the active save slot.
dashboard.settings_intro_profile: Choose how this save slot applies mod settings. Select a preset, use global defaults, or customize every option individually.
dashboard.settings_intro_save: Edit settings for save slot {slot}. Values matching global defaults are not stored in the save override file.
dashboard.settings_save_persist_hint: Changes apply immediately; use the in-game save button to write them to disk.
dashboard.settings_loot_filter_budget_hint_on: Random pool markers use a dungeon-wide scrap-value budget (not a spawn count). With a filter active, Auto Scale Map Loot Budget for Filter inflates that budget when your allowed items are worth more, so Map Loot Multiplier still increases how many items spawn.
dashboard.settings_loot_filter_budget_hint_off: Random pool markers use a dungeon-wide scrap-value budget. With a filter active and auto budget scaling off, high-value allowlists spawn fewer items unless you raise Map Loot Multiplier further.
dashboard.picker_catalog_unavailable: Catalog unavailable — connect to a game session with loaded data.
dashboard.settings_local_hint: This setting only affects your local game client.
dashboard.settings_host_badge_hint: This setting only affects the host game session.
dashboard.settings_host_only_hint: Only the host can change this setting.
dashboard.settings_guest_readonly: You are connected as a guest. Host-only settings are shown for reference but cannot be changed.
dashboard.confirm_delete_player: Permanently delete all stored data for {name} ({steamId})? This removes statistics, voice recordings, and display names.
dashboard.settings_feature_disabled_hint: Enable this feature to edit these settings
dashboard.quick_export_help: Creates a share string from the settings currently applied to this save slot. Copy it to back up your preset or share it with other hosts.
dashboard.quick_import_help: Paste a share string from another save slot or host. The preset is saved to your user preset list and can be applied from the cards above.
